chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Bail Appln. No.S-1068 of 2025 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE. 1. For orders on M.A. No.6388/2025 2. For orders on M.A. No.6389/2025 3. For hearing of bail application. 05.11.2025 Mr. Naeemuddin Chachar, Advocate alongwith applicants. ******** 1. Urgency allowed. 2. Through instant bail application, applicants Ali Muhammad alias Ali and Dad Muhammad alias Dad both sons of Shamsuddin seek protective bail in Crime No.51/2025 Police Station, Jarwar for offence under Sections 302 PPC. It is, inter alia, contended that applicant is innocent and has falsely been involved in this case by the concerned Police with malafide intention and ulterior motives. It is further contended that as soon as applicant came to know he tried to surrender himself before the concerned Court for pre-arrest but applicant has grave apprehension of his being arrest before reaching the same at the hands of concerned police hence, he has approached this Court for grant of protective bail. Be that as it may, without touching merits and demerits of the case and in order to enable him to appear before concerned Court he is granted protective bail for a period of Five days commencing from today, subject to his furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.30,000/- each (Rupees Thirty thousand) and PR bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of Additional Registrar of this Court. This order shall cease to have its effect on expiry of said period or on appearance of applicant before concerned Court, whichever is earlier. In case, applicant fails to surrender before the concerned Court within stipulated period, his bail bond shall stand forfeited.

This order shall cease to have its effect on expiry of said period or on appearance of applicant before concerned Court, whichever is earlier. In case, applicant fails to surrender before the concerned Court within stipulated period, his bail bond shall stand forfeited. Bail application stands disposed of in the above terms. J U D G E Ihsan/PS
